label: Code execution, interpreters & sandboxes

node.label: Code execution, interpreters & sandboxes
node.definition: Code-execution environments parse and run generated programs inside interpreters, containers, virtual machines, or restricted sandboxes with observable results.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Code execution, interpreters & sandboxes is modeled as depending on Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations, Caches, APIs & tool interfaces and feeding downstream nodes such as Reflection, critique, verifier & repair loops, Human-in-the-loop, permissions & sandboxing, Code models, copilots & repository intelligence.
